svg.title: Power Demand pair-value heatmaps
svg.desc: Side-by-side pair-value grids over the same 24 Power Demand records: the finite metric space on the left and the padded-vector baseline on the right.
svg.text: Record-to-record metric values, normalized within each grid. UCR 2021, CC BY 4.0.
Top color strip marks each record role; darker cells are smaller metric values.
The baseline grid flattens the role structure the alignment metric keeps.
